expectations.text: The skill assigns representative deep dives to task agents via an explicit Execution annotation
expectations.evidence: Found **Execution**: Task agent annotation on a representative deep-dive step

expectations.text: Every major step includes explicit success criteria
allowed-tools includes the benchmark-analysis core tool mix from the session summary
Frontmatter includes argument metadata and trigger language for benchmark_path triage requests
expectations.evidence: arguments=['benchmark_path'], argument-hint=['benchmark-path'], when_to_use=Use when the user wants a quick triage of benchmark or eval results, asks to review a benchmark.json or iteration directory, or says things like "triage this benchmark", "review these eval failures", or "summarize what the benchmark says to fix next".
